summary: ENISA Threat Landscape 2025 (October 2025) provides a strategic overview of cyber threats affecting the EU during the reporting period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025, highlighting phishing as the dominant initial vector, rapid exploitation of vulnerabilities, ransomware prominence, and recurring post-compromise discovery and persistence tradecraft mapped to MITRE ATT&CK.

timeline.evidence_snippet: The reporting period referred to spans from 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025

timeline.event: End of ETL 2025 reporting period (cut-off date)
timeline.evidence_snippet: with the cut-off date being 30 June 2025

timeline.event: Publication month of ENISA Threat Landscape 2025
